text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the day of the first Classic Triple Crown race,
the Satsuki Sho, the crowd roars with anticipation
to see the big three—Seiun Sky versus Special
Week versus King Halo.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yet despite all this attention, Seiun Sky is almost
late for the race because she was—of all
things—petting a cat in a park!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Still, she assures me that she's taking this
seriously. She meets her opponents' intense gazes
head on.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But not before she sends a picture of the cat to
her grandfather with the message, "I'm going to
take home the Triple Crown."
